judgment.summary: Profitable, fast-growing financial services firm with strong analyst support and a reasonable forward valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 2.5%; next earnings date is 2026-07-16.
positives: Revenue growth 15.8% YoY and earnings growth 38.6% YoY indicate strong top- and bottom-line expansion.
Operating margin of 49.4% and profit margin of 38.0% demonstrate excellent operational efficiency.
Forward P/E of 12.54x is attractive relative to trailing P/E of 17.97x and analyst growth estimates.
Consensus rating is 'buy' from 20 analysts with a mean target of $115.85, well above the current price.
negatives: Debt/Equity ratio of 120.77% is high, though typical for the financial sector.
Current ratio and quick ratio of 0.63 suggest potential short-term liquidity concerns.
Free cash flow (TTM) is not provided, making it difficult to assess cash generation directly.

news.paragraph: Piper Sandler raised its price target on Charles Schwab to $105, citing expected revenue upside from improving net interest margins. This analyst upgrade suggests a positive outlook on the company's ability to leverage its scale and market position. Traders should consider this target as a potential near-term upside driver, while noting the upcoming July earnings date as a catalyst.

headlines.title: Piper Sandler Raises PT On Charles Schwab (SCHW) To $105, Cites Revenue Upside From NIM Improvement
